name: superbereza.md
description: Public skills for AI coding agents — Things 3, file/app sharing, remote-control launcher.

plugins.name: things
plugins.description: Read/write Things 3 tasks (inbox/today/projects, add/complete/update) — JSON output, CLI + agent skill

plugins.name: drop
plugins.description: Securely share any file, folder, or running app via a password-protected HTTPS link

plugins.name: claude-remote
plugins.description: Launch Claude Code Remote Control sessions in a detached tmux pane and get the claude.ai/code URL
